Choose Lutemon to be trained! //Lutemon HP: %1$d/%2$d Attack: %1$d Defence: %1$d Experience: %1$d (%1$s) %1$s has been healed! Maximum level reached! Next level reached! %1$d clicks until next level. 
Current level (%2$d/10) //Colors White Black Green Turquoise Orange //Battle strings %1$d: %2$s; ATT: %3$d; HP: %4$d; DEF: %5$d; EXP: %6$d
 %1$s attacks %2$s
 %1$s escapes.

 %1$s dies.
 The battle is over!
 //Error strings Error! No Lutemons found! //Storage names Home Train Fight
